policy.purpose: Deduplicate and update recurring memory events before appending to daily memory or promoting to MEMORY.md.
policy.dailyMemory: Allow progress updates for the same task, but use the same fingerprint when the task identity is the same.
policy.longTermMemory: Merge by project/fact/rule and keep only the latest stable version.
policy.privacy: Never store passwords, cookies, tokens, private chat transcripts, or raw sensitive data.

memory-system:workspace:dream-memory-ena.subject: dream-memory-enable
memory-system:workspace:dream-memory-ena.summary: Enabled lightweight dream memory: daily memory, MEMORY.md promotion, heartbeat maintenance, and index-based deduplication.

memory-maintenance:workspace:promote-rec.subject: promote-recent-lessons
memory-maintenance:workspace:promote-rec.summary: Promoted durable lessons from recent daily memory into MEMORY.md, then rechecked through 11:13 with no new durable facts to promote.
